name: newsroom-extension
metadata.description: Full-stack AI toolkit for investigative journalism and editorial operations.

plugins.name: investigative-journalist
plugins.description: Expose abuses of public trust and investigate corruption by converting speculation into bulletproof documentation.

plugins.name: muckraker-master-file
plugins.description: Construct a relational registry of entities, evidence, and gaps to build a systemic case.

plugins.name: structural-dependency-mapping
plugins.description: Trace hidden incentive alignments and tacit relationships to expose systemic corruption.

plugins.name: osint-source-inversion
plugins.description: Research blocked or opaque targets via their adversaries' records and regulatory complaints.

plugins.name: temporal-anomaly-sequencing
plugins.description: Detect suspicious chronological compression or delays signaling coordinated malfeasance.

plugins.name: precision-foia-engineering
plugins.description: Draft surgically precise public records requests to prevent agency denial tactics.

plugins.name: corporate-veil-piercing
plugins.description: Break down anonymous corporate structures to identify beneficial ownership via OSINT and UCC filings.

plugins.name: zero-error-defensive-audit
plugins.description: Strip narrative risk from drafts and anchor every sentence to documentary evidence for libel defense.

plugins.name: data-archivist
plugins.description: Transform raw OSINT into queryable databases with a documented chain of custody.

plugins.name: copy-review
plugins.description: Technical publishing QA for readability, accessibility, and SEO metadata integrity.

plugins.name: social-distributor
plugins.description: Convert fact-checked articles into platform-optimized, legally defensible social posts.

plugins.name: final-editor-review
plugins.description: Adversarial libel filter that verifies all financial assertions and motives before publication.

plugins.name: publish-article
plugins.description: Safe, file-by-file deployment of approved articles with post-deployment verification.

plugins.name: publish-series
plugins.description: Coordinate multi-part series release with sequential editorial gates and cross-article linking.

plugins.name: managing-editor
plugins.description: Newsroom air-traffic controller managing sessions, TODOs, and cross-desk coordination.
